name: Psexec Accepteula Agreement Detected
notes:
This is rule detects psexec accepteula activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: omkar72
SIGMA Title: Psexec Accepteula Condition
SIGMA Description: Detects user accept agreement execution in psexec commandline


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of psexec.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%accepteula%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Psexec Accepteula Agreement Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of psexec.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%accepteula%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Psexec Accepteula Agreement Detected
Event description: Detects psexec accepteula activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
